name: likas-backend
description: LIKAS Flood Vulnerability DSS — Node.js API Backend

scripts.db:schema: node -e "require('dotenv').config(); const {Pool}=require('pg'); const fs=require('fs'); const p=new Pool({connectionString: process.env.DATABASE_URL}); p.query(fs.readFileSync('src/db/schema.sql','utf8').replace(/--.*/g, '')).then(()=>{console.log('Schema applied');p.end()}).catch(e=>{console.error(e);p.end()})"
